axis_priorities.name: pose
axis_priorities.rationale: dS/d(d_pose) = 272.77 at this operating point. Improving d_pose by 1e-5 reduces score by ~0.00273 (linear approximation; pose term is sqrt so the actual reduction is slightly larger for the same delta).

axis_priorities.name: seg
axis_priorities.rationale: dS/d(d_seg) = 100.00 (constant). Improving d_seg by 1e-4 reduces score by 0.01000.

axis_priorities.name: bytes
axis_priorities.rationale: dS/dB = 6.659e-07 per byte (constant 0.00067 per 1000 bytes). Saving 1 KB reduces score by 0.00067.

advice.label: adhoc
notes: pose-dominated regime (d_pose 3.36e-05 < 2.50e-04); prioritize pose-targeted lanes — they have 2.73x the marginal score-per-byte vs seg lanes here
information floor at this byte budget = 0.12357 (strict lower bound; achievable only at d_seg=d_pose=0).

operating_regime_summary.advice: pose-dominated regime (d_pose 3.36e-05 < 2.50e-04); prioritize pose-targeted lanes — they have 2.73x the marginal score-per-byte vs seg lanes here
